title: tilia americana var. heterophylla
intro: Tilia americana var. heterophylla, also known as American Linden or Large-toothed Linden, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Tilia americana var. heterophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. This plant has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its sedative and carminative effects. In herbal preparations, Tilia americana var. heterophylla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and soothe respiratory issues.
